title: Contact | Simon Lightwood MP
meta_description: Simon Lightwood MP is the Labour and Co-operative Member of Parliament for Wakefield and Rothwell
headings: h3: During opening hours you can call us on 01924682269 ​
text_excerpt: --> Contact | Simon Lightwood MP top of page Home About Advice & Support Visit Parliament Gallery Transport Contact More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Get in touch. Contact form Email Write Call How to find us About you Before you begin you should check that Simon is your MP as there is a strict parliamentary protocol which means that MPs can only assist members of their own constituencies. Even if an issue arose elsewhere you should still contact your home MP. You can check who your MP is by entering your postcode on the UK Parliament website . We also have a more comprehensive Casework Form which guides you through everything we may need to assist you and allows you to upload supporting documents. Click here to complete that form instead of this one. First name (Required) Last name (Required) Multi-line address Country/Region (Required) Address (Required) Address - line 2 City (Required) Zip / Postal code (Required) Email (Required) Next Write ​ ​ ​ 16 Westmorland Street Wakefield WF1 1PJ ​ ​ Call ​ ​ During opening hours you can call us on 01924682269 ​ ​ ​ ​ How to find us Our address: 16 Westmorland Street, Wakefield, WF1 1PJ ​ Travelling by public transport: ​ Bus: Routes 110, 149, 189, 268, and 425 all pass near Westmorland Street Train: The nearest train stations are Wakefield Westgate and Wakefield Kirkgate ​ Walking from Wakefield Bus Station: ​ Head southeast on Union Street towards Westgate. Turn left onto Westgate and continue straight. Turn right onto Westmorland Street. ​ The office will be on your left. It's a short walk, taking about 5 minutes.​ ​ Walking from Wakefield Westgate: ​ Head southeast on Mulberry Way towards Westgate. Turn left onto Westgate and continue straight. Turn right onto Westmorland Street. ​ The walk should take about 5-7 minutes. ​ Walking from Wakefield Kirkgate: ​ Head northwest on Monk Street towards Kirkgate. Turn left onto Kirkgate and continue straight. Turn right onto Westmorland Street. ​ The walk should take about 10-12 minutes. ​ Parking ​ ​ The Ridings Shopping Centre Car Park (George Street, WF1 1DS) Merchant Gate Car Park (Mulberry Way, WF1 2QN). Turton Street Car Park (WF1 4DR) ​ ​ You can also find more options and book spaces in advance using services like Parkopedia or JustPark ​​ Disabled parking ​ The Ridings Shopping Centre Car Park (George Street, WF1 1DS): This car park has many disabled spaces and is also the home of Wakefield Shop Mobility Borough Road Car Park (Borough Road, WF1 3AZ): This car park has around a dozen disabled spaces On-street parking: Blue Badge holders can park in the bay at the top of Westmorland Street (outside The Raven pub) or in one of the several on-street parking spaces on Wood Street Email You can email Simon at simon.lightwood.mp@parliament.uk ​ © 2026 Simon Lightwood MP | Privacy Policy | Work for Simon | Office Standards | Promoted by Simon Lightwood c/o Yorkshire & the Humber Labour, Quayside House, Canal Wharf, Leeds, LS11 5PS bottom of page
